education.school: Industrial University of Ho Chi Minh City

projects.name: Yuki
projects.preview: A full-stack e-commerce platform for selling and buying products.
projects.description: Our e-commerce website, built on Next.js, tRPC, Prisma, Lucia, and Uploadthing, offers a seamless shopping experience. With a responsive interface, efficient APIs, and secure authentication, it provides a user-friendly platform for all your shopping needs. The website handles large volumes of data, ensuring high performance. It also manages product images effectively for accurate representation. Notably, it sends emails to users for sign-up confirmation, password reset, account deletion, and order confirmation. In essence, our website is a comprehensive, one-stop-shop for a smooth and enjoyable shopping journey.

projects.name: Egg Community
projects.description: Our social media app, built on Next.js, ElysiaJS, Prisma, Lucia, and Cloudinary, offers a dynamic platform for sharing photos and posts. The responsive Next.js frontend ensures a user-friendly interface, while ElysiaJS powers the backend for efficient data handling. Prisma, as our database ORM, ensures smooth data transactions. Lucia provides secure authentication, enabling features like sign-up, sign-in, and account deletion. Cloudinary, our image management solution, handles image uploads effectively, ensuring high-quality visual content. Notably, the app sends emails for sign-up confirmation, password reset, account deletion, and post notifications. In essence, our social media app offers a comprehensive platform for a vibrant online community.

projects.name: Yukit
projects.preview: A full-stack application for managing tasks.
projects.description: Our task manager application, built on Next.js, tRPC, Prisma, Clerk, and Framer Motion, offers a comprehensive and dynamic solution for managing tasks. The Next.js frontend provides a responsive and user-friendly interface, while Framer Motion adds engaging animations for a more interactive user experience. The backend, powered by tRPC, ensures efficient data handling for seamless task operations. Prisma, our database ORM, guarantees smooth data transactions, enabling you to create, update, and delete tasks with ease. Clerk, our authentication solution, ensures secure access to your tasks, providing a safe environment for your data. In essence, our task manager application is a robust, secure, and visually engaging platform for all your task management needs.

projects.name: Portfolio
projects.preview: A portfolio website built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS.
projects.description: Our portfolio website, built on Next.js and Fumadocs, offers a comprehensive platform to showcase my skills, projects, and blog posts. The Next.js frontend ensures a responsive and user-friendly interface, providing a seamless browsing experience. Fumadocs, our blogging solution, allows for the creation and management of blog posts, enabling me to share my thoughts and insights effectively. The website serves as a digital portfolio, displaying my personal information and a collection of my projects, providing a snapshot of my capabilities. In essence, our portfolio website is a dynamic, engaging, and informative platform for showcasing my professional journey.

projects.name: Digit Recognition
projects.preview: A digit recognition application built with Python and NumPy.
projects.description: Our digit recognition app, built from scratch using Python and NumPy, offers a powerful solution for recognizing handwritten digits. The app utilizes a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), a deep learning algorithm known for its effectiveness in image classification tasks. Trained on the MNIST dataset, a large database of handwritten digits, the app has honed its ability to accurately identify digits from 0-9. This application showcases the power of machine learning in practical applications, turning complex data into understandable and usable information. In essence, our digit recognition app is a testament to the capabilities of modern AI technology.
